mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 260 in the CPIAUCSL index signals central bank inaction, leading to real rate compression and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite inflationary signal, or CPIAUCSL fails to predict returns in 3-year out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in FEDFUNDS and rising CPIAUCSL indicate stagflationary pressures, causing equity market volatility and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows positive 20d returns in > 50% of co-occurrence instances, or pairwise correlations between proxies and returns drop below 0.15 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A 2% monthly decline in INDPRO signals industrial contraction, creating downside risk for corporate earnings and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or INDPRO fails to predict returns in 1-year rolling window tests.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 140,000 in PAYEMS indicates robust labor market conditions, driving consumer spending and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or PAYEMS fails to predict returns in 2-year out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.3% monthly increase in UNRATE signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate profit margins and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or UNRATE fails to predict returns in 3-year rolling window tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts above 1,400 thousand units in HOUST indicate strong demand for construction, boosting related sectors and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or HOUST fails to predict returns in 1-year out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals strong macroeconomic demand, driving corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX shows negative 60d returns in > 40% of co-occurrence instances, or pairwise correlations between proxies and returns drop below 0.2 in out-of-sample tests.
